hooks.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'Cargo.lock' && echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit Cargo.lock — this is a library crate' && exit 1 || exit 0
file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.rs$'; then cargo fmt 2>/dev/null; fi
file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.rs$'; then cargo test --lib 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.rs$'; then cargo clippy --lib 2>&1 | grep 'warning\|error' | head -10; fi
